source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
1 tbsp (18 g) salt, plus more to taste
1 (1-lb [455-g]) box linguine noodles
2 tbsp (30 ml) grapeseed oil
¼ cup (40 g) minced shallots
3 to 4 cloves garlic, minced
3 tbsp (42 g) vegan butter, divided
1 lb (455 g) Vegan Shroom Shrimp
2 tbsp (15 g) all-purpose flour
¾ cup (175 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
¼ cup (28 g) vegan Parmesan cheese
½ cup (56 g) vegan mozzarella cheese
2 tbsp (15 g) Cajun seasoning
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder
1 tsp cayenne pepper
1 tsp freshly ground black pepper
1 tbsp (4 g) fresh parsley, for garnish
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
1 tbsp (18 g) salt, plus more to taste
1 (1-lb [455-g]) box linguine noodles
2 tbsp (30 ml) grapeseed oil
¼ cup (40 g) minced shallots
3 to 4 cloves garlic, minced
3 tbsp (42 g) vegan butter, divided
1 lb (455 g) Vegan Shroom Shrimp
2 tbsp (15 g) all-purpose flour
¾ cup (175 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
¼ cup (28 g) vegan Parmesan cheese
½ cup (56 g) vegan mozzarella cheese
2 tbsp (15 g) Cajun seasoning
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder
1 tsp cayenne pepper
1 tsp freshly ground black pepper
1 tbsp (4 g) fresh parsley, for garnish

ingredients.item: In a large pot, bring 6 cups (1.4 L) of water to a boil for the linguine and add the salt. When the water starts to boil, add the noodles and cook according to the package directions until al dente. Once done, drain and set aside.
ingredients.original: In a large pot, bring 6 cups (1.4 L) of water to a boil for the linguine and add the salt. When the water starts to boil, add the noodles and cook according to the package directions until al dente. Once done, drain and set aside.

ingredients.item: Add 2 tablespoons (28 g) of the vegan butter and your shrimp, searing on each side for 2 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove the shrimp from the heat and set aside.
ingredients.original: Add 2 tablespoons (28 g) of the vegan butter and your shrimp, searing on each side for 2 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove the shrimp from the heat and set aside.

ingredients.item: To the same pan, add the remaining tablespoon (14 g) of vegan butter and melt it down. Now, add your flour to make a roux, whisking until the butter and flour combine. Whisk in the nondairy milk, and once it gets hot, add your vegan Parmesan cheese and vegan mozzarella cheese and stir until the cheese is completely melted.
ingredients.original: To the same pan, add the remaining tablespoon (14 g) of vegan butter and melt it down. Now, add your flour to make a roux, whisking until the butter and flour combine. Whisk in the nondairy milk, and once it gets hot, add your vegan Parmesan cheese and vegan mozzarella cheese and stir until the cheese is completely melted.
